# glasgate.ai — Full Content Corpus

> AI-ready data pipelines for the web.

## Home

# glasgate.ai — AI-ready data pipelines for the web

Turn any website into clean, structured, AI-ready data for agents, LLMs, RAG systems, and automations.

glasgate.ai crawls public websites, removes boilerplate, structures content into schemas, and delivers JSON, Markdown, indexes, and APIs.

## Platform

# Platform — glasgate.ai

One platform for AI-ready data pipelines: extraction, structured outputs, APIs, delivery, and observability.
